titleStmt.title: SII 10.555: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 555. (A.R. No. 185 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1278 (Durmukhi)

summary.p: States that Aḍapa Vēmana, with the permission of Anavōtaya Reḍḍi, made gifts of gold, rice, ghee etc., to the temple of Tripurāntaka Gaurīparamēśvari and Vighnēśvara and also 25 cows for the upkeep of a perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1278 Agu nēṁṭi du¨rmukhisaṁvatsara nijaśrāvaṇa ba 8 śu rōhiṇīnakṣatrapuṇyasamayamuna śrīśrī
pa¨rvvataśirōmaṇi śrīkumāragiri śrītripurāṁttaka śrīmanmahādēvaraku svasti śrījaganobba gaṁḍajagarakṣapāla
hēmādridānaniratu laina svasti śrīmatu Anavōtayareḍḍiṁgāri Ānatini Aḍapavēmanaṁ gāru bhiṣē
kamunnu gaurīparamēśvariki nētinūnenu Abhiṣēkamunnu mahā Upahāramunnu kha 30 vuṭlu
biyyānanu vighnēśvaruniki yuṁḍrālunnu tripurāṁttakadēvaraku nūṟumāḷlettu baṁggā rāna Uṁgaramunnu sama
rppiṁcina puṇyakālamappuḍu reḍḍiṁgārkiṁ buṇyamugānu Aḍapavēmanaṁgāru Akhaṁḍadīpā na kiccinamōdālu 25
vīniṁ jēkoni pōtayabhaktunikoḍku kāmanabōyuṁḍu nityasōleṁḍu nēyi tanaputrānu pautrikamu naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 10.555 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
